name: Peaches'n Cream Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sliced, canned peaches in syrup (drained)
recipeInstructions: Use ingredients at room temperature. Add all ingredients into the pan in the order listed. Select sweet bread and press Start. NOTE: Be sure to use peaches canned in light syrup. NOTE: If dough is too dry, add another tablespoon of peach juice after 5 minutes of kneading.
